title: sickingia fragrans
side_effects: Sickingia fragrans can have side effects if used improperly, such as inducing severe allergic reactions, skin irritation, and respiratory issues in some individuals. Prolonged exposure to the plant's volatile compounds has also been linked to headaches, dizziness, and nausea. In rare cases, improper handling of Sickingia fragrans can lead to the development of skin conditions like eczema and dermatitis. It is essential to handle the plant with caution and follow proper guidelines to minimize the risk of adverse health effects.
